summary: Iteration 8 - UI branding update testing complete. Verified: new SVG animated logo (3 golden cubes + RUKOS_CRYPTO | HUB text) on landing page, new RukosSidebarLogo in sidebar (expanded shows cube+text, collapsed shows cube only), watermarks removed from all pages (Dashboard, Portfolio, Admin, Knowledge), collapse button with transparent background. All 68 frontend tests passed, all 59 backend tests passed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (68/68 tests passed - 26 admin-portfolio, 12 core-flows, 14 dashboard-features, 15 knowledge-features, 1 golden-path)

seed_data_creation: Used existing admin@rukos.crypto and test@test.com accounts

Landing page shows animated SVG logo in hero section, buttons have transparent backgrounds where specified. All tests updated to verify new branding - watermark tests now check for count=0, logo tests check for SVG elements with data-testid rukos-animated-logo, rukos-sidebar-logo, rukos-cube-icon.
